{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Twisting Rivers
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of Twisting Rivers]] uses a combination of [[Ruler]] and [[Striker]] disciplines to accelerate [[Forged]] water.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
